items.title: England approach World Cup knockouts still with pl...
items.summary: As everyone expected, England reached the World Cup's knockout phase. Thomas Tuchel has said "the tournament starts now," so how far can they go?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jannik Sinner's shaky start raises questions -- is...
items.summary: Defending Wimbledon champ Jannik Sinner failed to make a dominant statement on Monday. Instead, an erratic opening match proved he is beatable.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: The link between ALS and football should not be overlooked or downplayed
items.summary: Chris Johnson's GMA interview didn't mention it, but the connection between ALS and football is real.
